info.description: Fight over the control of the island of Feta.
info.similarAwards:
2005 Meeples Choice Award Nominee
2005 Japan Boardgame Prize Best Advanced Game Nominee

clickRoutine.header: Are you sure you want to recall all the cards?

fields.text: Make sure the cards to be recalled are in the holder beneath your seat.

clickRoutine.header: You are about to reset the game, make sure everyone is seated.

fields.text: This will set up a new game.

clickRoutine.header: You are about to start a new game, make sure everyone is seated.

fields.text: This will set up the game.

clickRoutine.header: Are you sure you want to swap cards?

fields.text: This will place the right-most face-up card at the bottom of the draw deck and then draw a new card in its place.

lh9v.text:
Drag cards between holders and click buttons to move cards etc. Notice how the cards transition nicely from their old location to new location but dragging is not impacted.

The CSS transitions, including timing, are defined on this widget but applied in the `cardDefaults` property of the deck.
